authority: CONSTRAINTS_v1.7.md (human-readable master; regenerate this file on any change there; status strings use underscores)

guards.construction: for each draft class: SUM of that class's players' values in career year Y; average those sums across sampled classes; one figure per career year
guards.construction_provenance: OWNER_WORDED_2026-07-08; re-confirmed in the owner's own words during the v4.1 remediation (WD-1 closed); UPHELD against the audited W4 breach same day
guards.owner_rationale: market no-arbitrage (owner 2026-07-08): if year 1-2 players were going to be worth 50% more 2-3 years later, one would simply hold them; younger-player value must rise to compensate
guards.denominator: min(year_1_figure, year_2_figure) — owner-picked from symmetric options 2026-07-08 (WD-1b closed; if year-2 drops below year-1, year-2 becomes the denominator)
guards.basis_assertion: CODE READING ONLY — walk-forward property (model scoring cohort year T sees only data <= T) and class-sum construction asserted from the script's code; numeric fingerprint aid RETIRED 2026-07-08 (the old 139/111 signature equals the genuine walk-forward B1 row 138.9/111.0 — non-discriminating; do not resurrect)
guards.remediation_doctrine: owner-ruled 2026-07-08: NO blanket young multiplier to tick the box; investigate WHY younger players are under-valued relative to who they become 3-4 years later and rectify the identified mechanism; the retired 1.19x uniform sit-out lift stays retired

guards.dispensations_2026_07_11: two one-off owner waivers recorded: <=5 SCAR on <=45 rows; the NAMED-16 <=13 SCAR (list committed on the remediation branch). Gate unmoved.

guards.coverage_definition: engine_gap / implied_gap per young cohort (engine option-value premium vs realized-outcome-implied premium); floor locks the under-priced pocket young RUC picks 4-10 at 0.61; metric prices SYNTHS - candidates delegating synths byte-exactly cannot move it
guards.thresholds_provenance: supervisor_carried_from_rev117_supplement (WD-3); cold audit 2026-07-08 cross-checked PR #43 (claude/young-convexity-audit-bxevtd): VERBATIM MATCH, no discrepancy; x1.0524 re-denominated 2026-07-11 (picks scale with the currency, owner-ruled)
guards.escalation: remains ADVISORY until an EXPLICIT owner ruling makes it BINDING (owner-confirmed 2026-07-08; no automatic escalation). Scored as diagnostics at CA-5.

guards.construction: weighted-mean position-conditioned V0 == derived PVC per pick band (deviations net zero); y0 pick-sum -> wk1 cohort sum -> y1/2 sums chain with bounded steps, walk-forward
guards.provenance: owner-worded 2026-07-11; ratification at the v2.9 ruling session

anchors.comparator_note: corrected 2026-07-08 from the drifted 'toby-briggs' (not a player - owner; origin unknown). v2.5 baseline ordering was INVERTED (Gawn 2112 < Briggs 2145, audit-verified)

anchors.key_note: corrected 2026-07-09 from the drifted charlie-cameron (owner: Charlie has never been an anchor; Jeremy verified in store; charlie-cameron is a distinct GEN_FWD untouched by anchor logic)

anchors.availability_note: UPDATED v1.7: LTI/availability machinery EXISTS (v2.7-round injury build). v2.8 attribution: availability sole suppressor (avail_nerf -677, 2026 proration, lti_return_hc 0.0); cvx and KPF-spec absent; no ceiling clip; unwinds 2027.

anchors.threshold: direction_only, CLARIFIED (owner 2026-07-08): players already at the scrap floor satisfy FLAT (no further drop required); attributed floor-basis effects do not fail it; escalate ONLY if the decline lever is absent / failed to fold (numeric threshold closed as moot, OQ-E)

anchors.note: second pair PENDING - young_gun_tbd is unresolved; auditors skip it and report the skip

flag_general_rule: over-priced flags on YOUNG/year-1 cohorts are subordinate to G-FLOOR and the G-COHORT denominator; actionable over-priced flags live on the OLDER/lower-pick end
notes: player_key values follow the engine's key convention (e.g. isaac-kako); a build must verify each key against the source store before asserting, and report any key mismatch rather than guessing. (The toby-briggs drift, caught by exactly this rule at the 2026-07-08 audit, is the standing example.)
Anchors with min_delta_pct null pass on direction only; magnitude is owner-ruled on sight (Q3 closed). Owner reads are challengeable per CORE MISSION; only the owner waives a read.

WD-1/WD-1b closed 2026-07-08 and re-confirmed in the owner's own words during the v4.1 remediation: class-sum construction (per-capita overruled); denominator = the LOWER of the year-1 and year-2 figures - the auditor reports both figures and tests against the minimum.
G-COHORT UPHELD 2026-07-08 against the audited W4 breach (y4 142.4 / y5 140.8 / y6 131.7 vs hard 130, den = y1); remediation doctrine in the guard entry; candidate status lives in HANDOVER.

Owner rulings 2026-07-08: R0 yes (G-CONVEX advisory) - R3 hold out CONFIRMED post-units-correction (RL_PVCFIT=0 at bake; re-derivation queued 'with a view to fixing it') - A-FADE clarified (flat-at-scrap satisfies) - WD-2/WD-3/WD-4 ratified - OQ-A/B/C/D ratified, OQ-E moot, OQ-F deferred.

The auditor ASSERTS the class-sum construction and the walk-forward property BY READING THE SCRIPT'S CODE - any other basis means the guard is measured-on-the-wrong-basis (equivalent to unmeasured). The numeric fingerprint aid is RETIRED (non-discriminating; see the guard entry).
Label map (2026-07-08 rename): W-1/W-1b/W-2/W-3/W-4 are now WD-1/WD-1b/WD-2/WD-3/WD-4; R-A..R-F are now OQ-A..OQ-F. Older couriered docs may carry the old labels.

v1.7 (2026-07-12, at the v2.8 tag): re-denominations x1.0524 folded (A-BONT 3246; G-CONVEX floors); A3 legend 75%; G-FLOOR dispensations recorded; replacement bars = OWNER ARTIFACTS with recorded rationale (registry Part 1b; the 07-11 derivation numbers rejected); G-Y0 PROPOSED; travaglia read WAIVED 07-11 (A12 red stands data-honest); kysaiah read WAIVED 07-11.
